name: dhanlabh-ai-trading-platform
description: Production-oriented AI trading intelligence PWA for probability-based market analysis.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "vite --config frontend/vite.dev.config.mjs --configLoader native"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
